debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ UniformContinuous f

failed_attempts:
by
  rw [Metric.uniformContinuous_iff]
  intro ε hε
  have hε3 : 0 < ε / 3 := by positivity
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf hε3
  have hl_pos : 0 < l := hl.pos
  let K := Set.Icc (-(l + 1)) (l + 1)
  obtain ⟨δ, hδ_pos, hδ⟩ := Metric.uniformContinuousOn_iff.mp
    (isCompact_Icc.uniformContinuousOn_of_continuous (Continuous.continuousOn ‹_›)) (ε / 3) hε3
  refine ⟨min δ 1, lt_min hδ_pos zero_lt_one, fun x y hxy ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [lt_min_iff] at hxy
  obtain ⟨y_shift, hy_shift, h_per⟩ := hl (-x)
  let τ := -x + y_shift
  have hx_shift : x + τ ∈ K := by
    rw [Set.mem_Ico] at hy_shift
    simp only [τ, add_neg_cancel_left, Set.mem_Icc]
    constructor <;> linarith
  have hy_shift : y + τ ∈ K := by
    rw [dist_eq_norm, Complex.norm_eq_abs, abs_lt] at hxy
    rw [Set.mem_Icc] at hx_shift ⊢
    constructor <;> linarith [hxy.1.1, hxy.1.2]
  calc
    dist (f x) (f y)
      ≤ dist (f x) (f (x + τ)) + dist (f (x + τ)) (f (y + τ)) + dist (f (y + τ)) (f y) := dist_triangle4 ..
    _ ≤ ε / 3 + ε / 3 + ε / 3 := by
      gcongr
      · rw [dist_eq_norm, ← norm_neg, neg_sub]; exact h_per x
      · exact hδ _ hx_shift _ hy_shift (by simpa [dist_eq_norm] using hxy.1)
      · rw [dist_eq_norm]; exact h_per y
    _ = ε := by ring
